data.deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.
data.description: PII or sensitive data flows into or out of LLM without redaction — information disclosure risk
data.remediation: Scrub PII before sending to model APIs and filter model output before returning to users. Use libraries like presidio, scrubadub, or pii-catcher. OWASP LLM02:2025.

data.deadline_note: Article 50 transparency. Omnibus proposes: 2 Nov 2026. Trilogue in progress.

data.deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.
data.description: High temperature setting (>=1.0) — review whether hallucination risk is acceptable for this use case
data.remediation: Use temperature=0 or 0.1 for factual/production tasks. Reserve high temperature for creative tasks.

data.remediation: Use safetensors format or torch.load(path, weights_only=True). Never unpickle untrusted model files.

data.deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.
data.description: LLM output used as factual information without grounding or verification — misinformation risk
data.remediation: Implement retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) for factual tasks. Require citations and source attribution. Add fact-checking or grounding verification before presenting LLM output as fact. OWASP LLM09:2025.

data.description: High temperature setting (>=1.0) — review whether hallucination risk is acceptable for this use case
data.remediation: Use temperature=0 or 0.1 for factual/production tasks. Reserve high temperature for creative tasks.

data.deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.
data.description: Model loaded from untrusted source or with unsafe deserialisation — supply chain attack risk
data.remediation: Pin model revisions and verify checksums. Never use trust_remote_code=True in production. Use safetensors format. Audit third-party model sources. OWASP LLM03:2025.

data.deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.
data.description: PII or sensitive data flows into or out of LLM without redaction — information disclosure risk
data.remediation: Scrub PII before sending to model APIs and filter model output before returning to users. Use libraries like presidio, scrubadub, or pii-catcher. OWASP LLM02:2025.

data.deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

data.deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.
data.description: Unsafe model deserialization — arbitrary code execution risk
data.remediation: Use safetensors format or torch.load(path, weights_only=True). Never unpickle untrusted model files.

observations.observation: Automated decision function detected — Article 13 requires transparency to deployers about capabilities and limitations.

RAG (retrieval-augmented generation) pipeline detected — external data is injected at inference time. Article 10 data governance requirements apply to retrieved data, not only training data. Consider: data source provenance, freshness, access controls, and bias in the retrieval corpus.
